data.title: Celsius Holdings Stock Surges On Q4 Earnings Beat, Alani Nu Acquisition
data.description: Celsius reported fourth-quarter revenue of $332.2 million, beating analyst estimates of 327.97 million, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning GE Aerospace Stock In The Last 5 Years
Cruise Stocks Drop Amid U.S. Tax Crackdown Concerns: What's Going On?
data.description: Cruise stocks such as Carnival Corporation (NYSE: CCL), Royal Caribbean Inc. (NYSE: RCL) and Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE: NCLH) are trading lower Thursday after Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick suggested in an interview that those companies will have to start paying U.S. taxes.

data.title: EPAM Systems Shares Drop After Weak 2025 Guidance, Q1 EPS Forecast Miss
data.description: EPAM Systems Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) are trading lower Thursday following the company's fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 earnings report and its disappointing 2025 guidance.
